get.description: Get location chunk of recent medias. Returns a list of Media objects.

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
medias, max_id = await cl.location_medias_recent_chunk_v1(
    location_pk="213131048", max_id=None
)
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.description: Get location recent medias. Returns a list of Media objects.

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
medias = await cl.location_medias_recent_v1(location_pk="213131048", amount=10)
x-codeSamples.label: Python

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
items_list = []
max_id = None
while True:
    items, max_id = cl.location_medias_recent_chunk_v1("213131048", max_id=max_id)
    items_list.extend(items)
    if not max_id:
        break
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.description: Get locations using lat and long

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
res = await cl.location_search_v1(lat=None, lng=None)
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.description: Get location object by id. Returns a Location object.

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
res = await cl.location_by_id_v1(id="213131048")
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.description: Get location guides. Returns location guide data.

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
res = await cl.location_guides_v1(location_pk="213131048")
